name: chain_ph_launch_optimo_effortless_media_opt
method: [PH LAUNCH] optimo: effortless media optimizer for the web

stages.task: Scrape PH daily launches — extract product name, founder Twitter/email, category, upvote count, tagline
Filter: upvotes >= 50 OR category in [developer-tools, productivity, saas, design-tools, marketing]. Score founder reachability (Twitter DM open, email in bio, maker page)
Generate personalized cold outreach referencing their specific launch + offer EAS/content/SEO angle. Route to cold_email_pipeline.py or twitter_dm_outreach.py
